$comment: Baseline thresholds for PLAN_extreme-efficiency bench gate. Source of truth is docs/plans/PLAN_extreme-efficiency.md. Updated when a phase lands and delta is confirmed.

find_symbol_body.description: find_symbol with include_body=true returns body in response

target_after_phase_p1.$comment: Primitive mode keeps suggested_next_tools — the CodeLens signature orchestration hint — even though it costs ~120 bytes. Rationale: the hint steers the next agent-loop call (e.g. find_referencing_symbols after find_symbol) and the savings from avoiding one uninformed follow-up call dominate the ~120-byte cost many times over. Target keeps the ≤1.5× Serena ceiling (Serena 662 b × 1.5 ≈ 993, rounded to 1100 for headroom).

review_architecture.description: review_architecture cold call on test fixture

semantic_ready_cross_tool.description: review_architecture and get_ranked_context must report identical semantic readiness for the same session
